category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfk8s as a Kubernetes YAML to Terraform HCL converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as tfk8s.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/jrhouston/tfk8s, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Kubernetes YAML manifests and Terraform HCL conversion; current_curation.tags includes cli.
